overlays.label: Legend
overlays.description: Color and status legend for node markers.

items.label: Duplicate IP / Multiple Nodes at Location
items.description: Two or more advertised nodes share a rounded map coordinate.

items.label: Unreachable
items.description: Node failed the latest reachability check.

items.label: Reachable Now
items.description: Node was reachable in the latest crawl.

items.label: Reachable Within 24H
items.description: Node was seen during the 24-hour rolling window.

items.label: Not Yet Synced
items.description: Node reports a height below the current observed chain tip.

items.label: Synced / Uptime Over 48h
items.description: Synced node with long observed uptime.

items.label: Synced / Uptime Over 10m
items.description: Synced node with short but meaningful uptime.

items.label: Synced
items.description: Synced node without enough uptime metadata for a higher tier.

overlays.label: Telemetry HUD
overlays.description: Live map counters and network category totals.

overlays.label: Network Filter
overlays.description: IPv4, IPv6, Tor, I2P, and unknown network filters.

overlays.label: Status Filter
overlays.description: Sync, uptime, duplicate, and unknown status filters.

overlays.label: Source Badge
overlays.description: Selected crawler source and map build metadata.

overlays.label: Tor Atlantic Channel
overlays.description: Symbolic Atlantic plotting channel for Onion network nodes.

payload.label: Tor Atlantic Channel
payload.note: Overlay-network nodes are intentionally plotted to a symbolic ocean channel because physical attribution is limited.

overlays.label: I2P Indian Ocean Channel
overlays.description: Symbolic Indian Ocean plotting channel for I2P nodes.

payload.label: I2P Indian Ocean Channel
payload.note: Overlay-network nodes are intentionally plotted to a symbolic ocean channel because physical attribution is limited.

overlays.label: Heatmap Overlay
overlays.description: Weighted density overlay for node concentration.

overlays.label: Cluster Overlay
overlays.description: Zoom-level cluster overlays generated from rounded coordinates.

overlays.label: Attribution
overlays.description: Map tile, engine, and project attribution.
